question: List all movies.
sql: SELECT * FROM movies;

question: Show the titles of all movies.
sql: SELECT title FROM movies;

question: List movies released after 2020.
sql: SELECT title, release_year FROM movies WHERE release_year > 2020;

question: Find movies with rating greater than 8.
sql: SELECT title, rating FROM movies WHERE rating > 8;

question: Show movies released in 2023.
sql: SELECT title FROM movies WHERE release_year = 2023;

question: List movies longer than 120 minutes.
sql: SELECT title, duration_minutes FROM movies WHERE duration_minutes > 120;

question: Find directors from the United States.
sql: SELECT name FROM directors WHERE nationality = 'United States';

question: Show actors from the United Kingdom.
sql: SELECT name FROM actors WHERE nationality = 'United Kingdom';

question: List all movie genres.
sql: SELECT name FROM genres;

question: Find movies with rating between 7 and 9.
sql: SELECT title, rating FROM movies WHERE rating BETWEEN 7 AND 9;

question: List movies directed by Christopher Nolan.
sql: SELECT m.title FROM movies m JOIN directors d ON m.director_id = d.id WHERE d.name = 'Christopher Nolan';

question: Show movie titles with their director names.
sql: SELECT m.title, d.name AS director_name FROM movies m JOIN directors d ON m.director_id = d.id;

question: List movies in the Action genre.
sql: SELECT m.title FROM movies m JOIN movie_genre mg ON m.id = mg.movie_id JOIN genres g ON mg.genre_id = g.id WHERE g.name = 'Action';

question: Find all actors who acted in Inception.
sql: SELECT a.name FROM actors a JOIN movie_actor ma ON a.id = ma.actor_id JOIN movies m ON ma.movie_id = m.id WHERE m.title = 'Inception';

question: Show the genres of the movie Interstellar.
sql: SELECT g.name FROM genres g JOIN movie_genre mg ON g.id = mg.genre_id JOIN movies m ON mg.movie_id = m.id WHERE m.title = 'Interstellar';

question: List movies and their average review scores.
sql: SELECT m.title, AVG(r.score) AS average_score FROM movies m JOIN reviews r ON m.id = r.movie_id GROUP BY m.id, m.title;

question: Find movies reviewed by John Smith.
sql: SELECT m.title FROM movies m JOIN reviews r ON m.id = r.movie_id WHERE r.reviewer_name = 'John Smith';

question: List actors and their roles in The Dark Knight.
sql: SELECT a.name, ma.role_name FROM actors a JOIN movie_actor ma ON a.id = ma.actor_id JOIN movies m ON ma.movie_id = m.id WHERE m.title = 'The Dark Knight';

question: Show movies directed by directors from the United Kingdom.
sql: SELECT m.title, d.name AS director_name FROM movies m JOIN directors d ON m.director_id = d.id WHERE d.nationality = 'United Kingdom';

question: List action movies released after 2015.
sql: SELECT m.title, m.release_year FROM movies m JOIN movie_genre mg ON m.id = mg.movie_id JOIN genres g ON mg.genre_id = g.id WHERE g.name = 'Action' AND m.release_year > 2015;

question: Which director has directed the most movies?
sql: SELECT d.name, COUNT(m.id) AS movie_count FROM directors d JOIN movies m ON d.id = m.director_id GROUP BY d.id, d.name ORDER BY movie_count DESC LIMIT 1;

question: Which actor has appeared in the most movies?
sql: SELECT a.name, COUNT(ma.movie_id) AS movie_count FROM actors a JOIN movie_actor ma ON a.id = ma.actor_id GROUP BY a.id, a.name ORDER BY movie_count DESC LIMIT 1;

question: Which genre has the most movies?
sql: SELECT g.name, COUNT(mg.movie_id) AS movie_count FROM genres g JOIN movie_genre mg ON g.id = mg.genre_id GROUP BY g.id, g.name ORDER BY movie_count DESC LIMIT 1;

question: Find the movie with the highest average review score.
sql: SELECT m.title, AVG(r.score) AS average_score FROM movies m JOIN reviews r ON m.id = r.movie_id GROUP BY m.id, m.title ORDER BY average_score DESC LIMIT 1;

question: List directors who have directed more than 2 movies.
sql: SELECT d.name, COUNT(m.id) AS movie_count FROM directors d JOIN movies m ON d.id = m.director_id GROUP BY d.id, d.name HAVING COUNT(m.id) > 2;

question: List movies that have more than 3 actors.
sql: SELECT m.title, COUNT(ma.actor_id) AS actor_count FROM movies m JOIN movie_actor ma ON m.id = ma.movie_id GROUP BY m.id, m.title HAVING COUNT(ma.actor_id) > 3;

question: Find movies that belong to more than one genre.
sql: SELECT m.title, COUNT(mg.genre_id) AS genre_count FROM movies m JOIN movie_genre mg ON m.id = mg.movie_id GROUP BY m.id, m.title HAVING COUNT(mg.genre_id) > 1;

question: Show the average rating of movies for each director.
sql: SELECT d.name, AVG(m.rating) AS average_rating FROM directors d JOIN movies m ON d.id = m.director_id GROUP BY d.id, d.name;

question: Find genres whose movies have an average rating greater than 8.
sql: SELECT g.name, AVG(m.rating) AS average_rating FROM genres g JOIN movie_genre mg ON g.id = mg.genre_id JOIN movies m ON mg.movie_id = m.id GROUP BY g.id, g.name HAVING AVG(m.rating) > 8;

question: List movies that have no reviews.
sql: SELECT m.title FROM movies m LEFT JOIN reviews r ON m.id = r.movie_id WHERE r.id IS NULL;
